title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter launched Fusion, a system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, analyzes their responses to identify blind spots, and synthesizes them into a stronger unified answer. A budget Fusion configuration achieved performance close to Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, an OpenRouter system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies blind spots, and synthesizes one unified answer. It matters because ensembling and multi-model chaining are presented as an alternative to relying on a single frontier model. The key takeaway: a budget Fusion configuration reached performance close to Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
